text_en: That feeling right now… What was it?{END}

text_jp:
仮面ライダー、今に我々の
本当の力を思い知らせてやる{END}
text_en: Kamen Rider, soon we will show you our true power.{END}

text_jp:
ドクガンダー、何度再生しようと
お前たちの野望はオレが打ち砕く！{END}
text_en: Dokugander, no matter how many times you revive, I'll crush your ambitions!{END}

text_jp:
再生？…フン、オレはもはや
ショッカーの一員ではない{END}
text_en: Revive? Hmph. I am no longer a member of Shocker.{END}

text_jp:
邪悪な力により再びこの世に生を受けた
闇の世界の創造者なのだ！{END}
text_en: By an evil power, I have been reborn as creator of the world of darkness!{END}

text_jp: ショッカーではない…邪悪な…力…{END}
